name: Sauteed Potatoes with Thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in a large pot of boiling salted water for 5 minutes.
2. Drain well and let cool completely. (This can be prepared up to 1 day ahead; cover and refrigerate.)
3. Divide the butter between 2 heavy large skillets and melt over medium-high heat.
4. Add half of the potatoes to each skillet and sauté until tender and golden brown, about 10 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Sprinkle with thyme and serve.
